mnemonics: High Priority = Hypnotized Pig Rides Unicorn
keyPoints: Multiple Threads: Multiple Threads can run simultaneously and concurrently.
isAlive() and join() methods: isAlive() checks if a thread is alive or dead, and join() waits until a thread terminates.
Thread Priorities: Threads can be prioritized based on their importance and urgency.
Synchronization: Synchronization is used to coordinate access to shared resources.
Inter-thread Communication: Inter-thread communication is used to exchange data between threads.
Suspending and Resuming: Threads can be suspended and resumed to pause their execution.
Stopping a Thread: A thread can be stopped using the Interrupt() method or the interrupt() of the Thread object.
